description: Spec-driven ROM relocation and opcode patching for apps/rastan-direct using the existing postpatch pipeline.

rom_absolute_call_relocation.description: Rewrite absolute long ROM targets in relocated arcade code.

opcode_replace.note: Suppress arcade TC0140SYT coin-counter clear in L5 handler; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress arcade TC0040IOC video-control write in L5 handler; no Genesis equivalent.
Coin input bit 6 -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Coin input bit 4 -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Coin input bit 5 -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.

OPEN-018 Class A: route raw PC080SN FG immediate write at runtime 0x3A550 (HW_ADDRESS 0x00C08A52 code 0x0032, attr 0) through genesistan_hook_inline_fg_write_3a550 -> genesistan_hook_tilemap_fg_fill live LUT. OPEN-018 padding: trailing 4E71 fills original 8-byte move.w #imm,abs.l after 6-byte jsr abs.l; byte-padding only, NOT suppression.
Bypass PC080SN readback cmp/bne path (read from 0xC0883A invalid on Genesis).
System input read -> direct shadow byte symbol.
TC0040IOC P1 read -> direct shadow byte symbol.
TC0040IOC P2 read -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Bypass PC080SN readback cmp/bne path (read from 0xC09EA3 invalid on Genesis).

OPEN-018 Class A: route raw PC080SN FG immediate write at runtime 0x3A8FE (HW_ADDRESS 0x00C08E7A code 0x2744, attr 0) through genesistan_hook_inline_fg_write_3a8fe -> genesistan_hook_tilemap_fg_fill live LUT; helper preserves live D0 for following glyph renderer. OPEN-018 padding: trailing 4E71 fills original 8-byte move.w #imm,abs.l after 6-byte jsr abs.l; byte-padding only, NOT suppression.

OPEN-018 Class A: route raw PC080SN FG immediate write at runtime 0x3A908 (HW_ADDRESS 0x00C08E66 code 0x2744, attr 0) through genesistan_hook_inline_fg_write_3a908 -> genesistan_hook_tilemap_fg_fill live LUT; helper preserves live D0 for following glyph renderer. OPEN-018 padding: trailing 4E71 fills original 8-byte move.w #imm,abs.l after 6-byte jsr abs.l; byte-padding only, NOT suppression.
Secondary TC0040IOC P1 read -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Secondary TC0040IOC P2 read -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Tilt bit test -> direct shadow system byte.
System input read -> direct shadow system byte.

OPEN-018 Class A: route raw story comma PC080SN FG immediate write at runtime 0x3ACEA (HW_ADDRESS 0x00C09172 code 0x2749, attr 0) through genesistan_hook_inline_fg_write_3acea -> genesistan_hook_tilemap_fg_fill live LUT. OPEN-018 padding: trailing 4E71 fills original 8-byte move.w #imm,abs.l after 6-byte jsr abs.l; byte-padding only, NOT suppression.
Test button bit test -> direct shadow system byte.
Redirect PC080SN yscroll clear write to Genesis staged BG Y scroll mirror.
Redirect PC080SN xscroll clear write to Genesis staged BG X scroll mirror.
Service/system bit test -> direct shadow byte symbol.
Bypass PC080SN readback cmp/bne crash site (read from 0xC09E87 invalid on Genesis).
System input bit 5 test -> direct shadow system byte.
Coin input bit 6 test -> direct shadow coin byte.
Coin input bit 4 test -> direct shadow coin byte.
System input bit 6 test -> direct shadow system byte.
Coin input bit 6 test -> direct shadow coin byte.
Coin input bit 5 test -> direct shadow coin byte.

PC090OJ + tilemap polymorphic-utility dispatch at fn 0x3AD44 via v3.2 helper genesistan_hook_3ad44_dispatch. Intercepts 7 callers: 3 PC090OJ-targeting (0x03AD5C, 0x03AD6E, 0x03AD82; A0 ∈ [0xD00000, 0xD00800)) routed to PC090OJ bulk-clear branch (LUT-mediated, slots 76..79 destination space); 4 tilemap-targeting (0x03AE70, 0x03AE80, 0x03AF38, 0x03AF48; A0 ∈ [0xC00000, 0xC10000)) routed to tilemap-branch reusing genesistan_hook_tilemap_bg_fill semantics. A0 dispatch on entry; out-of-range A0 falls through to §7.3 audit-guard halt-with-heartbeat. Replaces v3.1 PC090OJ-only helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_init_clear_3ad44 (which broke pre-existing tilemap coverage). See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §2.2.A and §8.6 entry #8.
Suppress arcade-only absolute hardware write while preserving helper software mirror behavior.
Suppress arcade-only absolute hardware write while preserving helper software mirror behavior.
Suppress arcade-only absolute hardware write while preserving helper software mirror behavior.
Suppress arcade-only absolute hardware write while preserving helper software mirror behavior.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress arcade PC080SN screen-flip write; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress arcade PC090OJ sprite-DMA trigger; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress arcade TC0140SYT coin-counter clear in startup; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control clear at 0x380000.
Suppress arcade TC0140SYT sound-CPU reset write; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress arcade TC0140SYT sound-CPU bank write; no Genesis equivalent.
Suppress arcade RAM-probe write-back at 0x200000 (unmapped on Genesis).
Suppress arcade TC0140SYT sound-CPU reset write (second pass).
Suppress arcade TC0140SYT sound-CPU bank clear (second pass).
Suppress arcade RAM-probe write-back at 0x200000 (second pass).
Redirect arcade work-RAM base A0 from 0x10C000 (unmapped on Genesis) to Genesis WRAM 0xFF0000; matches A5 remap at 0x3AF04. Downstream zero-propagate loop at 0x3AEF6..0x3AF02 inherits.
Redirect arcade work-RAM propagate-destination A1 from 0x10C002 to Genesis WRAM 0xFF0002; matches A5 and A0 remaps. Loop ends at 0xFF3FFE, no BSS clobber.
Redirect arcade A5 workram base from 0x10C000 (ROM on Genesis) to Genesis WRAM 0xFF0000.
Suppress arcade TC0040IOC video-control write in startup (first).
Suppress arcade TC0040IOC video-control write in startup (second).
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress arcade TC0040IOC video-control write in startup (third).
Route PC080SN BG per-line scroll-RAM clear from raw word-fill primitive 0x3AD3C to the staged/semantic dispatch at 0x3AD44; preserves A0/D0/D1 for genesistan_hook_pc080sn_bg_scroll_fill.
Route PC080SN FG per-line scroll-RAM clear from raw word-fill primitive 0x3AD3C to the staged/semantic dispatch at 0x3AD44; preserves A0/D0/D1 for genesistan_hook_pc080sn_fg_scroll_fill.
Suppress arcade TC0040IOC video-control write in startup (fourth).
DIP1 default constant (0xFE), preserving downstream NOT/store logic.
DIP2 default constant (0xFF), preserving downstream NOT/store logic.
Redirect title-path PC080SN yscroll clear write to Genesis staged BG Y scroll mirror.
Redirect title-path PC080SN xscroll clear write to Genesis staged BG X scroll mirror.

Route title glyph/string renderer at arcade_pc 0x03BB48 (runtime Genesis 0x03BD48) through Genesis FG staging hook; preserve descriptor loop semantics while preventing direct PC080SN FG C-window writes.
Route number renderer at arcade_pc 0x03C2E2 through Genesis FG staging hook; intercept digit loop, leading-zero suppression, and ALL sentinel writes that otherwise target PC080SN FG tilemap hardware.

Route high-score FG producer at arcade_pc 0x03C3FE (runtime Genesis 0x03C5FE) through Genesis FG staging hook; preserve descriptor table at runtime 0x03C654 and prevent raw PC080SN FG C-window writes at runtime 0x03C62A/0x03C646/0x03C64A.
Route text writer handler at arcade_pc 0x03C4D2 to Genesis FG staging hook and prevent direct C-window FG writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0xA0) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0xC0) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0xB0) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0x30) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0x90) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0x20) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route text-writer handler (script opcode 0x10) to Genesis FG staging hook; prevent direct C-window writes.
Route dispatcher fall-through default-path writer at arcade_pc 0x03C950 to Genesis FG staging hook; intercepts A1@+ stride-2 writes and 0x0180 fast-fill escape.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Suppress unsupported TC0040IOC control write at 0x380000.
Route PC080SN BG strip producer through rastan-direct hook symbol at 0x055968.
Route PC080SN FG strip producer through rastan-direct hook symbol at 0x055990.

Rewrite PC080SN scroll register write function: redirect all four MOVE.W destinations from hardware (0xC20000/0xC40000/0xC20002/0xC40002) to Genesis staged scroll variables. Same opcodes, same A5-relative sources, same RTS. Fixes scroll for ALL callers including gameplay.

Route PC080SN BG block-copy engine through rastan-direct staging helper. Used by title/attract art block setup at arcade 0x05A38E (JSON segment 171 maps runtime 0x05A58E -> 0x05A6DE): preserves width/height/source/dest/attr contract and stages cells into staged_bg_buffer with bg_row_dirty.
Replace PC080SN C-window fill loop with JSR to Genesis-side staged buffer clear hook. Hook fills staged_bg_buffer and staged_fg_buffer with LUT-translated blank tile and marks all rows dirty.

OPEN-022/KF-032: route shared PC080SN text writer at runtime 0x0565A6 through destination-range dispatcher. Reuses arcade substitution routine 0x0565CE, forwards live attr unchanged, routes BG/FG C-window cells to staging, and fail-loud traps unexpected destinations.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at writer fn 0x3B902 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_3b902). Intercepts 7 April-6 ledger callers (0x03A20E, 0x03A264, 0x03A640, 0x03A6C4, 0x03A820, 0x03B8E8, 0x03B8F0) plus 1 non-ledger caller (0x03A8E0). Helper emits SAT slots 0..4. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6 for full audit ledger.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at writer fn 0x3B926 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_3b926). Intercepts 2 April-6 ledger callers (0x03A9C6, 0x03A9D4). Original 0x3B926 falls through with bras into 0x3B902's loop body; helper subsumes that flow. Helper emits SAT slots 5..13. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A writer-helper body replacement at 0x3B930 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_3b930). Reached from target 0x3B902 (already covered by entry #1 — body replacement makes that path inert) AND from non-target init function 0x3B8B0 at 3 BSR sites (0x3B8BC, 0x3B8D2, 0x3B8E2). Without this entry, init-time writes to 0xD00020/0xD000E0/0xD00128 would hit unmapped Genesis memory. Helper emits SAT slots 14..17. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at April-6 target fn 0x41DAE (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_41dae). 352-byte span covering main-loop + 4 sub-loop fallbacks. Helper emits Block-A 18-sprite frame to SAT slots 0..17 + sub-loops. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at April-6 target fn 0x41F5E (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_41f5e). Intercepts April-6 caller 0x03A854 and the target itself. Helper emits Block-B 4-sprite copy to SAT slots 18..21. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at April-6 target fn 0x45DFA (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_45dfa). Intercepts April-6 caller 0x03A818 and the target itself. Helper re-emits the 22-sprite frame to SAT slots 0..21 (alternate emitter for game phases that re-issue). See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at April-6 target fn 0x59F5E (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_target_59f5e). Intercepts April-6 caller 0x03A8E4 plus 3 non-ledger callers (0x051266, 0x0519A0, 0x055E18). Helper clears SAT slots 0..7 (the 0xD00048+ region). See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x3AD84 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_init_priority_3ad84). Intercepts 2 ledger callers via 0x3AD72 fall-through (0x03ABB6, 0x03AF28). Helper initializes 4 priority-frame slots at SAT range 76..79 (the 0xD00778 origin per Andy_d00778_write_path_analysis.md). See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x3B802 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_score_digit_3b802). Intercepts 10 ledger score/HUD-digit callers (0x03A66A, 0x03A9C0, 0x03A9CE, 0x03A9DA, 0x03B7A2, 0x03B7B0, 0x03B7E0, 0x03B8C2, 0x03B8F6, 0x03B8FC). 174-byte span includes the function's PC-relative digit-attribute table at 0x3B87E..0x3B8AF (referenced only from inside the function). Helper emits HUD-digit sprites to SAT slots 22..29. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x54052 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_slot_init_54052). Intercepts 2 ledger callers (0x0501F4, 0x051260). Helper preserves the original function's Taito C-chip text-RAM clears at 0x10D1B2/0x10D1D2/0x10D1F2 (replicated verbatim) and emits sprite-slot init to SAT slots 72..75. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x54810 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_sprite_update_54810). Intercepts 2 ledger callers (0x0547EE, 0x054804). Helper emits 4-sprite-per-call update to SAT slots 44..55. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x5607C (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_sprite_decay_5607c). Intercepts 1 ledger caller (0x055E92). Helper performs sprite-decay Y-decrement on SAT slots 56..63 (sprite-disappear when Y reaches 16). See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x56114 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_copy_56114). Intercepts 2 ledger callers (0x05604C, 0x056076). Helper copies 4 word-pairs from source descriptor list (terminated by 0xFFFF) into SAT slots 64..67. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x56440 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_zero_fill_56440). Intercepts 2 ledger callers (0x055F0E, 0x055FFA). Inline helper 0x5648A is reached only from inside 0x56440 (single internal caller); body replacement renders it unreachable dead code. Helper zeroes SAT slots 68..71. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ Strategy A function-body replacement at INDEPENDENT writer fn 0x5A098 (helper genesistan_pc090oj_hook_status_sprite_5a098). Intercepts 1 ledger caller (0x051054). 498-byte span includes the inline helper at 0x5A244..0x5A289 (called only from 0x5A210 inside the function). Helper emits 12-write-per-call status/UI sprite descriptors to SAT slots 30..43. See Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §8.6.

PC090OJ audit guard at arcade_pc 0x0510EA. FU1 trace (Cody_fu1_arcade_trace_510EA_510F4.md) showed 0 hits in observed boot+attract+demo gameplay. Direct 8-byte movew #2,0xD00698 instruction replaced with JSR genesistan_pc090oj_hook_audit_guard + NOP. Helper captures CPU state and triggers controlled stop. Rule 8 walkthrough in Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §7.4.

PC090OJ audit guard at arcade_pc 0x0510F4. FU1 trace showed 0 hits in observed boot+attract+demo gameplay. Direct 8-byte movew #0,0xD00698 instruction replaced with JSR genesistan_pc090oj_hook_audit_guard + NOP (shared helper with entry #17). Helper captures CPU state and triggers controlled stop. Rule 8 walkthrough in Andy_pc090oj_implementation_spec.md §7.4.

Build 55 palette translator function-body replacement at 0x59AD4 (helper genesistan_palette_hook_59ad4). Helper reproduces source-row and bank semantics, converts arcade raw colors to xBGR-555 then to Genesis CRAM, stages low banks 0..3, and sets palette_dirty.

Build 0109 fall-through restore at 0x03AB00 (helper genesistan_palette_hook_03ab00). The helper reproduces the direct xBGR-555 literal write (#0x03FF to 0x200022) as a staged Genesis CRAM update for bank 1 entry 1; trailing 4E71 is approved byte-neutral NOP padding so execution falls through into the intact high-score tail at runtime 0x03AD08 (clear/init/render/timer-reload/master-advance). The original arcade move.w fell through; prior 4E75 wrongly terminated. NOT suppression.

Build 55 revised Option D bypass intercept at 0x045DB8. Single-instruction JSR target swap replaces jsr 0x3A2D0 with genesistan_palette_hook_45dae while preserving native counter/state mutations around the call.

KF-036 item-page descriptor-table output rebase: runtime 0x055AF8 0x0010D0A8 -> Genesis-WRAM 0x00FF10A8.

PC080SN descriptor source-pointer relocation hook: runtime 0x055B04 jumps to a JSON-segment-guarded rebuild helper; supersedes the Build 0116 literal read-base rebase at this same opcode_replace site.
KF-036 item-page descriptor-table rebuilt-pointer base rebase: runtime 0x055B0A #0x0010D040 -> Genesis-WRAM #0x00FF1040.
KF-036 item-page descriptor-table copied-word base rebase: runtime 0x055B10 #0x0010D080 -> Genesis-WRAM #0x00FF1080.
KF-036 item-page descriptor-table output rebase: runtime 0x055B40 0x0010D0A8 -> Genesis-WRAM 0x00FF10A8.

KF-036 item-page same-page descriptor work-RAM rebase: runtime 0x055E2E #0x0010D0FC -> Genesis-WRAM #0x00FF10FC.

Build 55b active arcade palette writer replacement at 0x03BA64 (runtime 0x03BC64). Helper reproduces original pointer/count side effects, translates active writer output to Genesis staged palette for banks 0..3, skips high banks, and sets palette_dirty on staged writes.

absolute_long_pointer_tables.note: OPEN-016/KF-028: title glyph/string descriptor-pointer table consumed at Genesis 0x03BD7C by renderer 0x03BD48. Relocate embedded source ROM descriptor pointers by +0x200; table ends before first descriptor at Genesis 0x03BE98.
